---
title: "Combined Plots"
format: html
---

## RUN OTHER ANALYSIS FIRST 



```{r}
library(patchwork)

p_den <- ggplot() +
  geom_jitter(
    data = combined_df2,
    aes(x = Treatment, y = n_corals, color = Treatment, shape = Treatment, fill = Treatment),
    width = 0.12,
    height = 0,
    alpha = 0.6,
    size = 2
  ) +

  # error bars
  geom_errorbar(
    data = emm_density_df,
    aes(x = Treatment, ymin = asymp.LCL, ymax = asymp.UCL, color = Treatment),
    width = 0.12,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +

  # emmeans points
  geom_point(
    data = emm_density_df,
    aes(x = Treatment, y = response, fill = Treatment),
    size = 3,
    shape = 21,
    color = "black",
    stroke = 1.2
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(
    "Con" = 21,
    "1x1" = 22,
    "2x2" = 23,
    "TopOnly" = 24
  ))+

  # letters
  geom_text(
    data = emm_density_df,
    aes(x = Treatment, y = letter_y, label = .group),
    size = 5
  ) +

  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Con" = "black",
    "1x1" = "darkorchid4",
    "2x2" = "darkred",
    "TopOnly" = "deepskyblue2"
  )) +

  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Con" = "black",
    "1x1" = "darkorchid4",
    "2x2" = "darkred",
    "TopOnly" = "deepskyblue2"
  )) +


  labs(
    x = "Treatment",
    y = "Number of Coral Individuals",
    title = "Estimated Coral Density by Treatment"
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
  "Con" = "Control",
  "1x1" = "Small",
  "2x2" = "Medium",
  "TopOnly" = "Large"
))+

  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"))


p_area <- ggplot() +
  # raw data
  geom_jitter(
    data = combined_df2,
    aes(x = Treatment, y = total_coral_area_cm2, color = Treatment, shape = Treatment, fill = Treatment),
    width = 0.12,
    height = 0,
    alpha = 0.6,
    size = 2
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(
    "Con" = 21,
    "1x1" = 22,
    "2x2" = 23,
    "TopOnly" = 24
  ))+

  # error bars (colored, solid)
  geom_errorbar(
    data = emm_df,
    aes(x = Treatment, ymin = asymp.LCL, ymax = asymp.UCL, color = Treatment),
    width = 0.12,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +

  # emmeans points (colored fill + black outline)
  geom_point(
    data = emm_df,
    aes(x = Treatment, y = response, fill = Treatment),
    size = 3,
    shape = 21,           # allows fill + outline
    color = "black",      # outline
    stroke = 1.2
  ) +

  # letters
  geom_text(
    data = emm_df,
    aes(x = Treatment, y = letter_y, label = .group),
    size = 6
  ) +

  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Con" = "black",
    "1x1" = "darkorchid4",
    "2x2" = "darkred",
    "TopOnly" = "deepskyblue2"
  )) +

  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Con" = "black",
    "1x1" = "darkorchid4",
    "2x2" = "darkred",
    "TopOnly" = "deepskyblue2"
  )) +

  scale_y_continuous() +

  labs(
    x = "Treatment",
    y = expression(bold("Total Coral Area (cm"^2*", log scale)")),
    title = "Estimated Coral Area by Treatment"
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
  "Con" = "Control",
  "1x1" = "Small",
  "2x2" = "Medium",
  "TopOnly" = "Large"
))+

  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black") )

```



```{r}
combined_plot <- p_area + p_den + plot_layout(ncol = 2)
combined_plot

setwd("C:/Users/brody/Desktop/Brody Thesis Project/Figures")
ggsave("Area and Den emm.jpg", width = 10, height = 5) 
```

```{r}
dodge <- position_dodge(width = 0.4)

p_time_area <- ggplot(total_area_p1,
       aes(x = Year,
           y = mean_total_coral_area_cm2,
           color = Treatment,
           group = Treatment
           )) +

  geom_line(
    data = pre_2022,
    alpha = 0.8,
    position = dodge
  ) +

  geom_point(
    aes(shape = Treatment, fill = Treatment),
    size = 2,
    position = dodge
  ) +

  scale_shape_manual(values = c(
    "Con" = 21,
    "1x1" = 22,
    "2x2" = 23,
    "TopOnly" = 24
  ),
  labels = c(
    "1x1"     = "Small",
    "2x2"     = "Medium",
    "TopOnly" = "Large",
    "Con"     = "Control"
  )) +

  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_total_coral_area_cm2 - se_total_coral_area_cm2,
      ymax = mean_total_coral_area_cm2 + se_total_coral_area_cm2
    ),
    width = 0.15,
    alpha = 0.6,
    position = dodge
  ) +

  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "1x1"     = "darkorchid4",
      "2x2"     = "darkred",
      "TopOnly" = "deepskyblue2",
      "Con"     = "black"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "1x1"     = "Small",
      "2x2"     = "Medium",
      "TopOnly" = "Large",
      "Con"     = "Control"
    )
  ) +

  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "1x1"     = "darkorchid4",
      "2x2"     = "darkred",
      "TopOnly" = "deepskyblue2",
      "Con"     = "black"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "1x1"     = "Small",
      "2x2"     = "Medium",
      "TopOnly" = "Large",
      "Con"     = "Control"
    )
  ) +

  labs(
    y = expression("Total Coral Area (cm"^2*")"),
    x = "Year",
    title = "Total Coral Area Through Time"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
  legend.position = "none",   # removes legend
  axis.title.x = element_blank(),  # removes "Year"
  #axis.text.x = element_blank(),   # removes tick labels
  axis.ticks.x = element_blank()   # removes tick marks
)


p_den_time <- ggplot(density_df,
       aes(x = Year,
           y = mean_density,
           color = Treatment,
           group = Treatment)) +

  geom_line(alpha = 0.8,
    position = dodge) +

  geom_point(
    aes(shape = Treatment, fill = Treatment),
    size = 2,
    position = dodge
  ) +

  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_density - se_density,
        ymax = mean_density + se_density),
    width = 0.15,
    alpha = 0.6,
    position = dodge
  ) +

  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Con" = "black",
    "1x1" = "darkorchid4",
    "2x2" = "darkred",
    "TopOnly" = "deepskyblue2"
  ),
  labels = c(
    "1x1"     = "Small",
    "2x2"     = "Medium",
    "TopOnly" = "Large",
    "Con"     = "Control"
  )) +

  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Con" = "black",
    "1x1" = "darkorchid4",
    "2x2" = "darkred",
    "TopOnly" = "deepskyblue2"
  ),
  labels = c(
    "1x1"     = "Small",
    "2x2"     = "Medium",
    "TopOnly" = "Large",
    "Con"     = "Control"
  )) +

  scale_shape_manual(values = c(
    "Con" = 21,
    "1x1" = 22,
    "2x2" = 23,
    "TopOnly" = 24
  ),
  labels = c(
    "1x1"     = "Small",
    "2x2"     = "Medium",
    "TopOnly" = "Large",
    "Con"     = "Control"
  )) +

  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Coral Density (# colonies per m²)",
    title = "Coral Density Through Time",
    color = "Treatment",
    shape = "Treatment"
  ) +

  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )

combined_plot_2 <- p_time_area + p_den_time + plot_layout(nrow = 2)
combined_plot_2

setwd("C:/Users/brody/Desktop/Brody Thesis Project/Figures")
ggsave("Area and Den time.jpg", width = 8, height = 10) 
```




```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# consistent dodge
dodge <- position_dodge(width = 0.4)

# make sure Year is treated as discrete in both datasets
total_area_p1$Year <- factor(total_area_p1$Year, levels = years)
pre_2022$Year      <- factor(pre_2022$Year, levels = years)
density_df$Year    <- factor(density_df$Year, levels = years)

# shared colors, shapes, and labels
treatment_colors <- c(
  "Con" = "black",
  "1x1" = "darkorchid4",
  "2x2" = "darkred",
  "TopOnly" = "deepskyblue2"
)

treatment_shapes <- c(
  "Con" = 21,
  "1x1" = 22,
  "2x2" = 23,
  "TopOnly" = 24
)

treatment_labels <- c(
  "Con" = "Control",
  "1x1" = "Small",
  "2x2" = "Medium",
  "TopOnly" = "Large"
)

# ---------- Total coral area plot ----------
p_time_area <- ggplot(
  total_area_p1,
  aes(x = Year,
    y = mean_total_coral_area_cm2,
    color = Treatment,
    fill = Treatment,
    shape = Treatment,
    group = Treatment)
) +
  geom_line(
    data = pre_2022,
    alpha = 0.8,
    position = dodge,
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_point(
    size = 2.5,
    position = dodge
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_total_coral_area_cm2 - se_total_coral_area_cm2,
      ymax = mean_total_coral_area_cm2 + se_total_coral_area_cm2
    ),
    width = 0.15,
    alpha = 0.6,
    position = dodge,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = treatment_colors,
    labels = treatment_labels,
    name = "Treatment"
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = treatment_shapes,
    labels = treatment_labels,
    name = "Treatment"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
  values = treatment_colors,
  labels = treatment_labels,
  name = "Treatment"
) +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = expression("Total Coral Area (cm"^2*")"),
    title = "Total Coral Area Through Time"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

# ---------- Coral density plot ----------
p_den_time <- ggplot(
  density_df,
  aes(x = Year,
      y = mean_density,
      color = Treatment,
      shape = Treatment,
      group = Treatment,
      fill = Treatment)
) +
  geom_line(
    alpha = 0.8,
    position = dodge,
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_point(
    size = 2.5,
    position = dodge
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_density - se_density,
      ymax = mean_density + se_density
    ),
    width = 0.15,
    alpha = 0.6,
    position = dodge,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = treatment_colors,
    labels = treatment_labels,
    name = "Treatment"
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = treatment_shapes,
    labels = treatment_labels,
    name = "Treatment"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = expression("Coral Density (colonies per m"^{2}*")"),
    title = "Coral Density Through Time"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
  values = treatment_colors,
  labels = treatment_labels,
  name = "Treatment"
) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

# ---------- Combine plots ----------
combined_plot_2 <- (p_time_area / p_den_time) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(
    tag_levels = "A"
  ) &
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
    plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.tag.position = c(0.02, 0.98)
  )

combined_plot_2

# ---------- Save ----------
setwd("C:/Users/brody/Desktop/Brody Thesis Project/Figures")
ggsave(
  "Area_and_Density_Through_Time.jpg",
  plot = combined_plot_2,
  width = 8,
  height = 10,
  dpi = 300
)
```
